category_sources: source_facts.description says text animation for Slack messages; official README says realtime text animation for Slack messages and primary use case is ChatOps.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading and source_facts.name both use slacknimate.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, authentication, usage, and examples, making it the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/mroth/slacknimate, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README topics include slack, devops, chatops, monitoring, ascii-art, slack-api, and text-animation.
